agent.plan.description: Break the request into concrete frontend tasks before editing or creating files.

goal.example: Expose granular tool activity in the studio timeline

agent.inspect.description: Inspect project structure, routes, components, or styling areas before making changes.

agent.search.description: Search the frontend codebase for components, hooks, status handling, or file references.

agent.read.description: Read one or more frontend files closely before editing.

agent.edit.description: Modify existing files with targeted frontend changes.

intent.example: Render each streamed agent action as its own timeline item

agent.create.description: Create new frontend files such as components, pages, stylesheets, or hooks.

intent.example: Add a dedicated timeline component for streamed tool events

agent.rename.description: Rename a file when the structure should change without duplicating code.

agent.delete.description: Remove obsolete frontend files that are no longer used.

agent.verify.description: Verify imports, routes, component wiring, and final frontend consistency before completing the response.

agent.complete.description: Mark the frontend task complete after planning, editing, and verification are finished.

summary.example: Granular agent activity stream and UI timeline are ready
